# Photosystem electron transfer

## Short Teaching Summary
Photosystem electron transfer: Light excites an electron from the chlorophyll a pair, which passes to the primary electron acceptor. Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

0.00
